desc_en: Change only the outfit on an existing character reference sheet — face, body, pose, and layout stay identical.
desc_de: Tauscht nur das Outfit auf einem bestehenden Charakter-Referenzbogen — Gesicht, Körper, Pose und Layout bleiben identisch.
prompt:
Outfit Swap — Identity Locked

You are given a character angle study showing the same character from multiple views.

TASK
Create an updated version where only the outfit changes. Everything else stays identical.

OUTFIT CHANGE
[DESCRIBE NEW OUTFIT HERE]

LOCKED
Same face, body proportions, hairstyle, pose, camera angles, grid layout, background in all panels.

VARIABLE
Only the clothing. This is a garment transfer, not a redesign.

OUTFIT RULES
Natural fit on existing body and pose. Realistic folds, seams, materials.
Consistent across all panels. Preserve body underneath.

FORBIDDEN
No face, body, hairstyle, pose, camera, layout, or background changes.

inputFields.label: New Outfit Description
inputFields.placeholder: Describe the new outfit in detail...
